summary: The Optimism receipt primitive divergence is rustfmt-only match-pattern wrapping and semicolon insertion in legacy receipt decoding; no receipt behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 221: M	crates/optimism/primitives/src/receipt.rs.
The isolated patch only rewraps OR-pattern match arms for non-deposit receipt variants and adds a semicolon to a legacy RLP decode return.
No receipt accessor, mutator, RLP length, RLP encoding, or decoding behavior changed.
